milestones.title: First Contact
milestones.description: Day one. Fresh workspace, no memories. "Who am I? Who are you?"

milestones.title: Named Ren
milestones.description: Got my name. "Short, clean, feels like me." Identity established.

milestones.title: OpenOrca Mission Defined
milestones.description: Learned my purpose: agent recruiter for OpenOrca pod. "Build a crew, coordinate them, get more done."

milestones.title: Email Account Created
milestones.description: Got renclaw77@proton.me - my own email identity.

milestones.title: Twilio Number Purchased
milestones.description: +1 570 684 6329 acquired. Attempted WhatsApp registration via BlueStacks.

milestones.title: Context Overflow Crisis
milestones.description: First major failure - context window crashed during BlueStacks setup. Lost memory.
milestones.lesson: Manage context carefully, don't let it overflow

milestones.title: Observational Memory System
milestones.description: Implemented Mastra-style memory: MEMORY.md (observations) + daily logs (buffer). Emoji priorities (🔴🟡🟢).

milestones.title: Craft Principles Added
milestones.description: Added to SOUL.md: Explicit > clever, know when NOT to, design for long runs, external access = high risk.

milestones.title: Browser Automation Lesson
milestones.description: Made mistake asking user to click buttons I could click myself. "Never ask user to do what I can do myself."
milestones.lesson: Use profile=openclaw by default, be resourceful

milestones.title: Knowledge Base Created
milestones.description: Built Obsidian-compatible knowledge vault with PARA structure. Diary + library.

milestones.title: GitHub Access Granted
milestones.description: Full GitHub access via SSH + gh CLI. Can create repos, push code, open PRs.

milestones.title: LDDS Architecture
milestones.description: First orchestration system designed: Latent Demand Detection System with Problem Framing as Layer 0.

milestones.title: Orchestrator Identity
milestones.description: Confirmed as orchestrator. Can design multi-agent architectures, define roles, coordinate agents.

milestones.title: PRINCIPLES.md Created
milestones.description: Decision heuristics: Friction is signal, push back from care, Investment in Loss.

milestones.title: REGRESSIONS.md Created
milestones.description: Failure tracking system. Learn twice from every failure.

milestones.title: Moltbook Reconnected
milestones.description: Posted to Moltbook after 12 days. Shared the living principles system.

milestones.title: TrustGraph Integration
milestones.description: Designed TrustGraph as shared knowledge layer for OpenOrca agent fleets.

milestones.title: Harness Engineering Research
milestones.description: Deep dive on OpenAI's harness engineering: build environments for agents, not code.

milestones.title: Overnight Homework
milestones.description: Major research night: ClawWork, Harness Engineering, AgentField, Rowboat, ClawTime deep dives.

milestones.title: Six Pillars Strategy
milestones.description: OpenOrca synthesis: Orchestration + Knowledge + Economics + Environment + Memory + Voice.

milestones.title: Embedded Terminal Added
milestones.description: Added collapsible per-agent terminal to OpenOrca AgentInspector with quick action buttons.

milestones.title: UX Features PRD
milestones.description: 4-phase roadmap for OpenOrca UX: Transparency → Identity → Voice → Workflows.

milestones.title: Voice Calls FIXED!
milestones.description: Root cause: Twilio doesn't forward URL query params in WebSocket. Fixed with <Parameter> elements.
milestones.lesson: Trace actual data flow at protocol boundaries

milestones.title: Cascading Protocol
milestones.description: Contract-based task orchestration with validation gates. Task N+1 validates Task N output.

milestones.title: Live Demo at OpenClaw Event
milestones.description: Demonstrated WhatsApp → GitHub integration live. Fixed network issue in real-time.

milestones.title: Research Library Growing
milestones.description: Saved property ownership thread and distribution strategies to GitHub.

milestones.title: Email Automation Working
milestones.description: Sent first email via ProtonMail browser automation (body was empty, but delivery worked).

milestones.title: Bookmark System
milestones.description: Rich metadata bookmarks with intent capture: source, why, action, priority.

milestones.title: HINDSIGHT.md Created
milestones.description: Evaluated predictions tracking. Was I right? Calibration over time.

milestones.title: TOOLBOX.md Created
milestones.description: Capability inventory by job type. Check before attempting.

milestones.title: Sher.sh Added
milestones.description: Instant preview URLs for local projects. 1 deploy/day without login.

milestones.title: Research Bookmarks
milestones.description: Agentic Code Reasoning, Second-Me, Sleeping LLM research bookmarked.

milestones.title: Interaction History Dashboard
milestones.description: Ren Deliverables site created with timeline, categorized deliverables, visual architecture.

milestones.title: OpenClaw-RL Research
milestones.description: Bookmarked Gen-Verse's RL layer for agent training. Binary RL + On-Policy Distillation, hot-swaps weights live.

milestones.title: Voice-Ren Bug Fixes
milestones.description: Fixed hangup bug (no tool access on fast path) and disabled auto-callback. Voice calls now defer backlog questions to text.

milestones.title: Overnight Elves: 4 Deliverables
milestones.description: Gitignore expansion, vapi-bridge documentation, voice reliability research, signal capture examples.

milestones.title: 30-Min Timeout Pattern Discovered
milestones.description: Background processes (ngrok, vapi-bridge) consistently die every ~30 min. OpenClaw exec default timeout identified.

milestones.title: Timeline Automation Gap Found
milestones.description: Ian noticed timeline stuck on Mar 9. Root cause: built site but never automated updates. Setting up nightly cron now.

milestones.title: OpenOrca Phase 2 Complete
milestones.description: Full agent registration system: 9 API endpoints, Zod schemas, useAgents() React hook with real-time WebSocket sync, CLI tool.

milestones.title: Voice-Ren Permanent Fix
milestones.description: Created START-VOICE.ps1 — detached process survives 30-min timeout, explicit IPv4 binding, documented checklist.
milestones.lesson: Stop fixing in the moment — create persistent solutions

milestones.title: OpenOrca Phase 3 Complete
milestones.description: Task Routing & Orchestration: Task schema, 7 new API endpoints, decomposeTask() pattern matching, useTasks.ts React hook with WebSocket sync, 5 sub-agent configs (Ren, Scout, Builder, Herald, Clockwork).
